headline: 今日AI速览：学术研究最活跃
narrative:
今日共收录102篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究39篇, 模型发布30篇, 开源项目24篇, 产品/API9篇。热门标签：Agent（30篇）。其中8%的文章有多来源交叉验证。

▸ tinyhumansai /openhuman：Your Personal AI super intelligence. Private, Simple and extremely powerful.

▸ HKUDS /CLI-Anything："CLI-Anything: Making ALL Software Agent-Native" -- CLI-Hub:https://clianything.cc/

▸ Anil-matcha /Open-Generative-AI：Open-source alternative to AI video platforms — Free AI image & video generation studio with 200+ mo

▸ BigBodyCobain /Shadowbroker：Open-source intelligence for the global theater. Track everything from the corporate/private jets of

▸ tech-leads-club /agent-skills：The secure, validated skill registry for professional AI coding agents. Extend Antigravity, Claude C
text: 今日共收录102篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究39篇, 模型发布30篇, 开源项目24篇, 产品/API9篇。热门标签：Agent（30篇）。其中8%的文章有多来源交叉验证。
